name: done-yet
description: Check the resulting state before Codex says a task is done.

interface.shortDescription: Test the world an agent changed.
interface.longDescription: Done Yet turns an intended outcome into a reviewable contract, runs independent postcondition checks, and reports PASS, FAIL, or HOLD before closeout.
interface.defaultPrompt: Create a Done Yet acceptance contract for this task, run its checks after the work, and only call the task complete when the result is PASS.
